overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a frontier settlement with a wooden cabin porch, a seated NPC against the wall, teepees in the mid-ground, and a mountainous forest landscape under a clear blue sky with slowly drifting clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cabin porch overlooking native settlement and mountains

agents.ego_description: standing still on the wooden porch, observing the settlement and surrounding wilderness

notable_agents.action: sitting against the cabin wall in the shade with arms crossed, remaining still throughout the clip

entered.detail: dark weathered log wall of the cabin casting shadows on the porch
wooden plank floor with visible grain, gaps, and dappled sunlight
red-handled meat cleaver or axe lying on the porch boards
traditional conical hide tents arranged in a small encampment beyond the porch
dense forest of tall evergreen pine trees surrounding the settlement
snow-dusted rocky mountain peaks rising in the background under blue sky
thin white column of smoke rising from a campfire and drifting slowly upward

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary on a wooden cabin porch, partially sheltered under the roof overhang. A Native American NPC sits motionless against the wall on the left. The view opens to a frontier settlement with teepees nestled among dense pine trees, while snow-capped mountains dominate the distant background. A thin plume of smoke rises from a fire in the mid-ground, and clouds drift slowly across the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze from a sheltered porch overlooking a serene frontier settlement nestled against a mountain backdrop. It begins under the wooden roof overhang of a cabin, where a Native American man sits motionless against the wall. The view then opens across the settlement, revealing teepees tucked among dense pine trees as a thin plume of smoke rises from a distant fire. Finally, the perspective extends toward the horizon, where snow-capped mountains dominate the landscape under a clear blue sky with slowly drifting clouds.
